name: Tamron Lens 15-30mm F/2.8 DI VC USD G2

features.Key Features:: Aperture Range: f/2.8 to f/22 | Three LD and Three Aspherical Elements | AX, eBAND, BBAR, and Fluorine Coatings | Ultrasonic Silent Drive Autofocus Motor | VC Image Stabilization | Moisture-Resistant Construction | Rounded 9-Blade Diaphragm | Compatible with TAP-in Console | Focal Length 15-30mm | Maximum Aperture F/2.8
